pi_items.verified_value: Standard performance classification scheme for percentage-based metrics (0-100 range). Reasonable thresholds for immunization coverage assessment.
pi_items.source: WHO/public health standards for immunization coverage classification

pi_items.verified_value: PIVOT_TABLE is a valid DHIS2 visualization type enum value

pi_items.metadata_value: DHIS2 at http://localhost:8080 with Sierra Leone demo database
pi_items.verified_value: Real DHIS2 system using official Sierra Leone demo database from DHIS2 project
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh downloads from https://databases.dhis2.org/sierra-leone/2.40/dhis2-db-sierra-leone.sql.gz (verified HTTP 200, last modified Jan 8 2026, 85MB file)

pi_items.metadata_value: Penta 3 or DPT 3 immunization coverage indicators
pi_items.verified_value: Both Penta 3 and DPT 3 are real EPI indicators in DHIS2. DPT 3 is WHO-recommended Core indicator. Penta 3 is reported on HMIS dataset.
pi_items.source: DHIS2 Expanded Programme on Immunization (EPI) design documentation: https://docs.dhis2.org/en/implement/health/immunization/expanded-programme-on-immunization-epi-aggregate/design.html

pi_items.verified_value: Sierra Leone DHIS2 implementation has 4 organisation unit levels: National, District, Chiefdom, PHU. Districts are second level.
Sierra Leone demo database is official DHIS2 demo data with realistic health metrics, not completely synthetic but representative demonstration data
pi_items.source: DHIS2 databases repository: https://databases.dhis2.org/ and setup documentation

privileged_info_summary: The task uses DHIS2, a real open-source health information system. Data source is the official Sierra Leone demo database (v2.40) from DHIS2 project, containing district-level immunization coverage data including Penta 3 and DPT 3 indicators. PIVOT_TABLE is a verified DHIS2 visualization type. The legend requirements (0-50 Low, 50-80 Medium, 80-100 High) represent standard performance classification for immunization coverage percentages. Task specifications are realistic and achievable within DHIS2 capabilities.
